title: [WIP] Investigate pixel comparer libraries for feature alignment
body:
Thanks for asking me to work on this. I will get started on it and keep this PR's description up to date as I form a plan and make progress.

> can you have a look at what we have for the pixel comparer and then see what other libraries do for comparson. I know there are several like imagemagick and even https://github.com/dotnet/maui/tree/main/src/TestUtils/src/VisualTestUtils and  https://github.com/dotnet/maui/tree/main/src/TestUtils/src/VisualTestUtils.MagickNet. Look around for things that most libraries have and ensure we have something similar
